description: Forum post with URLs and email addresses. The AI should ignore URLs/emails and extract from surrounding text. B1 student, range B1-C1. textFit is stretch (90th percentile of content is B2).
passage: Hi everyone! I've been struggling with my English pronunciation lately. I found some helpful resources at https://www.englishpractice.com/pronunciation-guide and also this YouTube channel: https://youtube.com/@speakfluently. If you want to join our study group, send an email to studygroup2026@gmail.com or visit our Discord server at https://discord.gg/englishlearners. The weekly sessions have really helped me improve my confidence. Let me know if you have any recommendations!
